name: Wadi El-Jin
overview: The events of "Wadi El-Jin" revolve in an exciting framework based on visual effects, and it deals with the story of four students who explore the caves of "Wadi El-Jin", and then enter another world after an evil force takes over them.

trailers.title: الإعلان الرسمي لمسلسل وادي الجن | Viu
